title: thelypteris paludosa var. glabrata
intro: Thelypteris paludosa var. glabrata, also known as the glabrate thelypteris fern, is a variety of the Thelypteris paludosa fern species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris paludosa var. glabrata include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural diuretic and to reduce blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris paludosa var. glabrata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steaming the leaves and roots of the plant to release its medicinal properties.
